visualizerParams.title: Bug Squasher: Bubble Sort Indices
visualizerParams.problemDescription: The bubble sort algorithm is causing an out-of-bounds error. Find the index mistake.

solution.explanation: The inner loop condition `j < n` would cause `arr[j+1]` to access `arr[5]` when `j` is 4, which is out of bounds for an array of size 5. The correct limit is `n - i - 1`.
